; Application configuration
; Generated by `quor init` -- edit as needed

[database]
host = localhost
port = 5432
name = storefront
; connection pool tuning
pool_size = 10
pool_timeout = 30

; Redis cache settings
[cache]
host = localhost
port = 6379
ttl = 300

[logging]
; valid levels: debug, info, warning, error
level = info
file = /var/log/storefront/app.log

[app]
; TODO: move this to a secrets manager before GA
secret_key = dev-only-not-real
debug = false
